title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm out and about with Air
Groove...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove stops suddenly. She's looking at a
claw machine filled with little Umamusume
plushies.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
How foolish. As if I would want such a ridiculous
thing.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
One of the younger students gave me a gift the
other day. I merely thought it might make a good
thank-you present.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She's a hard worker who is always aspiring to
fulfill her dreams. She deserves a little something
to brighten her days.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, there's no guarantee I can even
win anything here... I'll have to consider other
options.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oho, big words. Very well, I'll hold you to that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Show me a performance worthy of the Empress's
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
